name: Fidelity Ethereum Fund
summary: PART I . Summary Fidelity Ethereum Fund (the Trust) is a Delaware statutory trust formed on October 31, 2023. The Trust issues common shares of beneficial interest (Shares), which represent fractional undivided beneficial interest in and ownership of the Trust. The Shares of the Trust are listed on the Cboe BZX Exchange, Inc. (Cboe BZX or the Exchange).
